Best Credit Repair Companies (2026)

Our expert analysis of the top credit repair companies based on pricing, effectiveness, BBB ratings, guarantees, and customer feedback.

If you're looking to fix errors on your credit report or remove negative items dragging down your score, hiring a professional credit repair company can save you time and frustration. We've researched and reviewed the leading credit repair services based on pricing, effectiveness, BBB ratings, guarantees, and customer feedback. Here are our top picks for 2026.

1

The Credit Pros

4.3/5
From $69.00/mo BBB: A+ Money-Back Guarantee Free Consultation

Full-service credit repair with credit monitoring, identity theft protection, and a money-back guarantee across all three bureaus.

Money-back guarantee provides a risk-free way to try the service
Credit monitoring and identity theft protection included in Standard and Premium plans
Works with all three major credit bureaus simultaneously
Read Full Review Visit The Credit Pros
2

Credit Saint

4.1/5
From $79.99/mo BBB: A+ Money-Back Guarantee Free Consultation

Premium credit repair with a 90-day money-back guarantee, escalated dispute strategies, and three service tiers to match your budget.

90-day money-back guarantee is one of the clearest refund policies in the industry
A+ BBB rating reflects strong complaint resolution and business practices
Escalated dispute strategy applies progressively stronger tactics over time
Read Full Review Visit Credit Saint
3

Sky Blue Credit Repair

4.0/5
From $79.00/mo BBB: A+ Money-Back Guarantee Free Consultation

Budget-friendly credit repair with no setup fees, simple flat-rate pricing, and a 90-day money-back guarantee. The longest-running credit repair company in the industry.

No setup fee — zero upfront cost to get started
Couples plan at $119/month is the best deal for partners repairing credit together
Longest track record in the industry — operating since 1989
Read Full Review Visit Sky Blue Credit Repair
4

The Credit People

4.0/5
From $79.00/mo BBB: B+ Money-Back Guarantee Free Consultation

Affordable credit repair with a unique flat-rate 6-month option at $419, offering significant savings over monthly billing. Low $19 setup fee makes getting started easy.

Flat-rate 6-month plan at $419 offers the best long-term value in the industry
Lowest setup fee at just $19 makes starting credit repair highly accessible
Competitive monthly rate of $79 even without the 6-month commitment
Read Full Review Visit The Credit People
5

Lexington Law

3.8/5
From $99.95/mo BBB: C+ Free Consultation

Attorney-led credit repair firm with legal expertise in consumer credit law. One of the most recognized names in credit repair, now operating under a restructured model.

Attorney-led disputes carry more legal weight than template-based services
Strong expertise in FCRA and FDCPA consumer protection laws
Effective for complex cases involving legal violations or identity theft
Read Full Review Visit Lexington Law
